content: We can frame Self-Refine’s iterative unstructured refinement framework as a foundational backbone for multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, where each Self-Refine iteration is seeded with a distinct inconsistent problem-solving perspective drawn from methods like Self-Contrast. This creates a hybrid system that retains Self-Refine’s key advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision while amplifying reflection depth by avoiding the common pitfall of single-perspective myopia.
